candidates.name: 15-entry checkpoint cycle pattern
candidates.description: Periodic maintenance rhythm during long operations. Every N items: rebuild indexes, audit quality, check for anti-patterns. Mid-session companion to session-end.

candidates.name: Parallel subagent cleanup workflow (5-batch audit)
candidates.description: Spawn batches of 5 agents, each audits one article across 6 dimensions (structure, length, tone, quotes, coherence, links). Deduplicate, then fix. Comparable to code-reviewer + skill-audit.

candidates.name: Writer-not-filing-clerk identity framing
candidates.description: Identity statement shapes every operation: 'what does this mean and how does it connect' vs 'where do I file this'. Reframes analysis/synthesis skill output.

candidates.name: Concurrency safety rules for LLM file ops
candidates.description: Re-read before editing, never delete without reading, rebuild indices only at command end. Partially captured in CLAUDE.md guardrails.
